## Documentation Changes

### Description
Brief description of documentation changes

### Type of Change
- [ ] New documentation page
- [ ] Update existing documentation
- [ ] Fix typos/grammar
- [ ] Update navigation structure
- [ ] Add code examples
- [ ] Update images/diagrams
- [ ] Add/update redirects

### Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the documentation style guidelines
- [ ] I have run markdown linting (`markdownlint-cli2`)
- [ ] I have validated internal links (no broken links)
- [ ] I have updated navigation in `docs.json` (if adding/moving pages)
- [ ] I have added redirects in `docs.json` (if moving/renaming pages)
- [ ] I have tested the changes locally (if possible)

### Documentation Validation
- [ ] All internal links are valid
- [ ] All images are displaying correctly
- [ ] Code examples are tested and working
- [ ] Navigation structure makes sense
- [ ] No markdown linting errors
- [ ] docs.json structure is valid
